positive: A minimalist, celestial forest scene featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna. Central composition with a majestic, crescent moon illuminating floating geometric islands and stylized mythological creatures (e.g., ethereal deer, winged fox) meandering through the phosphorescent forest canopy. Clean silhouettes are paramount. Vibrant cool color palette dominated by deep sapphire blues, turquoise, electric lime green, and soft violet, contrasted by stark white glowing highlights. Vector illustration aesthetic mixed with watercolor depth. High contrast, volumetric lighting, perfect for apparel print. Highly detailed, clean lines, 8k.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, grainy, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, monochrome, photorealistic, copyrighted, celebrity, poorly drawn
